The shop shutter vibrates through my palms as we lift it together
Fei Fei’s knuckles are papery and warm under my hand, a map of all our years
The thrum of the table anchors me as steam rises between us, and I am finally solid
The vibration of the table is clear, a heartbeat shared between the wood and my skin
The vibration is sharp and clear, a heartbeat shared through the wood under my hand
